content:
Q1: MODIFY: keep the verbatim-disjointness firewall, but require DAIS-faithful factor instantiation checks on recipient class/length/definiteness balance and item-level verb comparability; otherwise full project-construction risks measuring your own filler design more than DAIS’s surface.  
Q2: MODIFY: Arm A at 200×1 is only sound if the canonical condition is pre-registered as the same neutral baseline across all verbs; otherwise the single-condition pick can skew verb-bias. Arm B at ~40 verbs is thin for a monotonicity-rate claim against chance; either raise alternating verbs or downgrade Arm B to exploratory.  
Q3: A  
OVERALL: RATIFY-WITH-MODIFICATION
